name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature and how it should work.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other approaches? Why is this one preferred?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or references that help illustrate the feature.
